product: OpenAI GPT-5.3 Codex now available as a Databricks-hosted model
tagline: Mosaic AI Model Serving now supports OpenAI GPT 5.3 Codex as a Databricks hosted model.
what_it_does: Mosaic AI Model Serving now supports OpenAI GPT 5.3 Codex as a Databricks hosted model. This code specialized model excels at complex code generation, large scale refactoring, and enterprise software engineering tasks. You can access this model using Foundation Model APIs pay per token.
